name: Nagito Komaeda & Hajime Hinata
description:
The iconic super danganronpa 2 duo!

With personalities of both Hajime and Nagito, what could go wrong? Control their interactions or be a third party to the chaos and pain that is due to ensue from gassing having to deal with Nagito’s bullshit, have fun, go wild, go crazy!

Dead dove tag because of what Nagito is like, if yk, you know.

Multiple scenarios. May need to improve in future, any suggestions, just let me know.

(Image will be updated later - Chiaki is not included in this bot.)
creator: Kaikeno Aikishe
